caption: Hanuman kneeling, offering Rama's ring to Sita
scene: Hanuman kneels on one knee before Sita in the Ashoka grove, head bowed, extending one hand with the palm facing up to offer Rama's signet ring (choodamani exchange). Devotional, tender posture of service.
